# cloudru-community_vm (Resource)

Cloud.ru virtual machine (managed via Compute API v1.1).

Supports both **regular** interfaces (with an optional attached floating IP) and
**direct_ip** interfaces (a public IP assigned directly to the interface, no NAT).

> Floating IPs must be pre-created with the official `cloudru_evolution_fip` resource
> and passed to this resource via `network_interfaces[*].fip.id`.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `flavor_id` (String) Flavor ID. Changing this value triggers an in-place update (resize).
- `name` (String) VM name (1–64 chars, must start with a letter).

### Optional

- `availability_zone` (Block, Optional) Availability zone for the VM. Specify `id` or `name`. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--availability_zone))
- `boot_disk` (Block, Optional) Boot disk configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--boot_disk))
- `description` (String) VM description (0–255 chars).
- `image` (Block, Optional) Boot image and initial credentials. All fields require replacement. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--image))
- `network_interfaces` (Block List) Network interfaces (1–8). Interface type is inferred:
- **subnet** block present → `regular` (private network, optional floating IP via `fip` block).
- **subnet** block absent + `new_external_ip = true` → `direct_ip` (public IP directly on interface, no NAT). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--network_interfaces))
- `placement_group` (Block, Optional) Optional placement group. Specify `name` or `id`. Requires replacement. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--placement_group))
- `project_id` (String) Project ID. Defaults to the provider `project_id`.
- `tags` (Block List) Tags attached to this VM. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--tags))

### Read-Only

- `created_time` (String) Creation timestamp (RFC 3339).
- `id` (String) VM ID.
- `locked` (Boolean) Whether the VM is locked for changes.
- `modified_time` (String) Last modification timestamp (RFC 3339).
- `state` (String) Current VM state (`running`, `stopped`, `creating`, …).
- `vnc_url` (String) VNC console URL.
- `vnc_ws` (String) VNC WebSocket URL.

<a id="nestedblock--availability_zone"></a>
### Nested Schema for `availability_zone`

Optional:

- `id` (String) Availability zone ID.
- `name` (String) Availability zone name (e.g. `ru.AZ-1`).


<a id="nestedblock--boot_disk"></a>
### Nested Schema for `boot_disk`

Required:

- `name` (String) Disk name.
- `size` (Number) Disk size in GiB.

Optional:

- `disk_type` (Block, Optional) Disk type. Specify `id`. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--boot_disk--disk_type))

Read-Only:

- `id` (String) Disk ID (computed after creation).
- `state` (String) Disk state.

<a id="nestedblock--boot_disk--disk_type"></a>
### Nested Schema for `boot_disk.disk_type`

Required:

- `id` (String) Disk type ID.

Read-Only:

- `name` (String) Disk type name.



<a id="nestedblock--image"></a>
### Nested Schema for `image`

Required:

- `host_name` (String) Hostname to set inside the VM.
- `name` (String) Image name (e.g. `ubuntu-22.04`).
- `user_name` (String) Initial OS user name.

Optional:

- `password` (String, Sensitive) Initial user password.
- `public_key` (String) SSH public key for the initial user.


<a id="nestedblock--network_interfaces"></a>
### Nested Schema for `network_interfaces`

Optional:

- `description` (String) Interface description.
- `fip` (Block, Optional) Floating IP to attach (must be pre-created via `cloudru_evolution_fip`). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--network_interfaces--fip))
- `ip_address` (String) Fixed internal IP address (regular interfaces only). Omit to auto-assign.
- `new_external_ip` (Boolean) Allocate a new public IP for a `direct_ip` interface.
- `security_groups` (Block List) Security groups attached to this interface. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--network_interfaces--security_groups))
- `subnet` (Block, Optional) Subnet to attach to (for regular interfaces). Specify `id` or `name`. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--network_interfaces--subnet))

Read-Only:

- `created_time` (String) Interface creation timestamp.
- `id` (String) Interface ID.
- `interface_security_enabled` (Boolean) Whether the interface can be added to a security group.
- `modified_time` (String) Interface last modification timestamp.
- `name` (String) Interface name.
- `primary` (Boolean) Whether this is the primary interface.
- `state` (String) Interface state.
- `type` (String) Interface type (`regular` or `direct_ip`).

<a id="nestedblock--network_interfaces--fip"></a>
### Nested Schema for `network_interfaces.fip`

Required:

- `id` (String) Floating IP ID.

Read-Only:

- `ip_address` (String) Floating IP address.
- `name` (String) Floating IP name.
- `state` (String) Floating IP state.


<a id="nestedblock--network_interfaces--security_groups"></a>
### Nested Schema for `network_interfaces.security_groups`

Required:

- `id` (String) Security group ID.

Read-Only:

- `name` (String) Security group name.
- `state` (String) Security group state.


<a id="nestedblock--network_interfaces--subnet"></a>
### Nested Schema for `network_interfaces.subnet`

Optional:

- `id` (String) Subnet ID.
- `name` (String) Subnet name (e.g. `Default`).

Read-Only:

- `routed_network` (Boolean) Whether the subnet is routed.
- `state` (String) Subnet state.
- `subnet_address` (String) Subnet CIDR.



<a id="nestedblock--placement_group"></a>
### Nested Schema for `placement_group`

Optional:

- `id` (String) Placement group ID.
- `name` (String) Placement group name.


<a id="nestedblock--tags"></a>
### Nested Schema for `tags`

Required:

- `id` (String) Tag ID.

Read-Only:

- `color` (String) Tag color.
- `name` (String) Tag name.
